name: The Little Trencher Who Couldn’t
description: The project is a satirical play on the classic children's book The Little Engine That Could. • The Original: A story of optimism and perseverance ("I think I can, I think I can"). • The Parody: By naming it "The Little Trencher That Couldn't," the project adopts a narrative of failure, pessimism, or "anti-motivation." In the world of "degen" crypto trading, self-deprecating humor and irony are often used to build viral communities (similar to coins that pride themselves on having "no utility").
